scenarios.name: price_basis_audit
scenarios.question: Classify or block adjusted/raw/split/dividend status for Daily OHLCV labels.

scenarios.name: universe_breadth_missingness
scenarios.question: Measure universe breadth, missingness, stale symbols, and leading-zero code preservation.

scenarios.name: past_only_proxy_construction
scenarios.question: Build volatility/drawdown/breadth/dispersion/liquidity proxies using current or prior data only.

scenarios.name: regime_control_comparison
scenarios.question: Compare regime buckets against no-trade, shuffle, equal-weight top-k, and frozen D3 under cost sensitivity.

scenarios.name: stale_latest_fail_closed
scenarios.question: Verify missing, stale, or malformed latest artifacts fail closed and do not produce optimistic maturity states.

notes: This plan freezes audit intent only; it does not execute a run.
Positive-looking rows are diagnostic and cannot unlock D5/model/paper/live behavior.
Future labels are evaluation-only and forbidden as decision-time proxy inputs.
